2604.15972.title: Weak-Link Optimization for Multi-Agent Reasoning and Collaboration
2604.15972.paper_summary: LLM-driven multi-agent frameworks address complex reasoning tasks through multi-role collaboration. However, existing approaches often suffer from reasoning instability, where individual agent errors are amplified through collaboration, undermining overall performance. Current research mainly focuses on enhancing high-capability agents or suppressing unreliable outputs to improve framework effectiveness, while systematic identification and reinforcement of performance-limiting agents receive less attention. To address this gap, we propose WORC, a \underline{w}eak-link \underline{o}ptimization framework for multi-agent \underline{r}easoning and \underline{c}ollaboration, grounded in the weak-link principle. WORC follows a two-stage workflow. In the weak agent localization stage, task features are constructed, and a meta-learning-based weight predictor trained on optimal configurations identified by swarm intelligence algorithms (SIAs) enables zero-shot mapping from these features to agent performance weights, where the agent with the lowest predicted weight is identified as the weak agent. In the weak-link optimization stage, an uncertainty-driven allocation strategy assigns additional reasoning budgets to weak agents, with lower predicted weights leading to larger repeated-sampling quotas to compensate for reliability deficiencies. Experimental results show that WORC achieves an average accuracy of 82.2\% on reasoning benchmarks while improving framework stability and cross-architecture generalization, suggesting that compensating for weak links, rather than reinforcing strengths alone, enhances the robustness of multi-agent systems.
2604.15972.paper_summary_zh: LLM 驅動的多代理框架通過多角色協作來解決複雜的推理任務。<lb/>然而，現有的方法常常面臨推理不穩定的問題，個別代理的錯誤在協作中被放大，從而削弱整體性能。<lb/>目前的研究主要集中在增強高能力代理或抑制不可靠輸出以提高框架的有效性，而系統性識別和強化性能限制代理的問題則受到較少關注。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們提出了 WORC，一個基於弱鏈原則的多代理推理和協作的 \underline{w}eak-link \underline{o}ptimization 框架。<lb/>WORC 遵循兩階段的工作流程。<lb/>在弱代理定位階段，構建任務特徵，並基於元學習的權重預測器在由群體智能算法 (SIAs) 確定的最佳配置上進行訓練，實現從這些特徵到代理性能權重的零樣本映射，其中預測權重最低的代理被識別為弱代理。<lb/>在弱鏈優化階段，一種基於不確定性的分配策略將額外的推理預算分配給弱代理，預測權重較低的代理將獲得更大的重複抽樣配額，以補償可靠性不足。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，WORC 在推理基準上達到了 82.2\% 的平均準確率，同時提高了框架的穩定性和跨架構的泛化能力，這表明補償弱鏈而非僅僅強化優勢能增強多代理系統的穩健性。
2604.15972.author: Haoyu Bian et.al.
2604.15972.authors: Haoyu Bian, Chaoning Zhang, Jiaquan Zhang, Xingyao Li, Yuanfang Guo, Wei Dong, Yang Yang
